=== SECTION: CHARGE ===

R v Devon Walsh

Statement of Offence:
Theft from a shop, contrary to section 1(1) and 7(1) of the Theft Act 1968.

Particulars of Offence:
On 9 February 2026 at Riverside stole goods to the value of £340 belonging to Riverside Retail Ltd.

=== SECTION: MG5 ===

MG05 — OFFENCE REPORT

URN: 26/DA/002
Anticipated Plea: Not Guilty
Officer in case: PC Ng 8834

Headline Summary
CCTV still images are served showing a person in the store aisle. Master CCTV footage, full export, continuity, and audit trail are outstanding or referred only. Identification from stills alone is not safely confirmed on current papers.
